attributes.description: count() per bucket split by statusClass — baseline traffic and error regressions
attributes.title: Request Rate by Status Class
attributes.visState: {"title": "Request Rate by Status Class", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "statusClass", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "customLabel": "status class"}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "requests/bucket"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "requests/bucket", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.title: Queries by Shard Role
attributes.visState:
{"title": "Queries by Shard Role", "type": "markdown", "aggs": [], "params": {"fontSize": 11, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "### Queries by Shard Role — setup required

`databaseQueriesByRegionAndDbShardRole` is a stringified JSON blob.
Add two scripted fields to the index pattern to unlock this chart:

| Field | Painless target |
|---|---|
| `mysqlQueriesMain` | sum of `main` values across all regions |
| `mysqlQueriesApplicationLive` | sum of `applicationLive` values |

Once added, replace this panel with a stacked bar:
`sum(mysqlQueriesMain)` + `sum(mysqlQueriesApplicationLive)` split by date_histo.
"}}

attributes.description: p50/p95/p99 of durationMs — p99 spike = tail-latency regression
attributes.title: Request Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Request Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "durationMs", "percents": [50, 95, 99], "keyed": false}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "log", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "ms"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "ms", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: avg(mysqlDurationMs) vs avg(durationMs) — rising mysql at flat total = regression
attributes.title: MySQL Share of Total Request Time
attributes.visState: {"title": "MySQL Share of Total Request Time", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "mysqlDurationMs", "customLabel": "mysql"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "durationMs", "customLabel": "total (LLM + mysql + other)"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "ms (avg)"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "ms (avg)", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear", "fill": 0.4}, {"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "fill": 0.4, "data": {"label": "total (LLM + mysql + other)", "id": "2"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: avg + p95 of mysqlNumQueries — step-up after deploy = regression
attributes.title: MySQL Queries per Request — avg + p95
attributes.visState: {"title": "MySQL Queries per Request \u2014 avg + p95", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "mysqlNumQueries", "customLabel": "avg"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "mysqlNumQueries", "percents": [95], "keyed": false, "customLabel": "p95"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "queries"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "queries", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}, {"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "p95", "id": "2"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: stacked 100% view of statusClass — rising error band = error-rate regression
attributes.title: Request Status Breakdown (%)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Request Status Breakdown (%)", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "statusClass", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "customLabel": "status class"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "percentage"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "% of requests"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "% of requests", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": false}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: count of statusClass:serverError — spike = active incident

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query": {"query": "msg:\"outgoing non crud log line of\" AND statusClass:serverError", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": [], "indexRefName": "kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
